title: pityrogramma rupicola
intro: Pityrogramma rupicola, also known as the rock fern, is a type of species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Pityrogramma rupicola include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Pityrogramma rupicola can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health concerns.
